2605.18618.title: Stochastic Penalty-Barrier Methods for Constrained Machine Learning
2605.18618.paper_summary: Constrained machine learning enables fairness-aware training, physics-informed neural networks, and integration of symbolic domain knowledge into statistical models. Despite its practical importance, no general method exists for the non-convex, non-smooth, stochastic setting that arises naturally in deep learning. We propose the Stochastic Penalty-Barrier Method (SPBM), which extends classical penalty and barrier methods to this setting via exponential dual averaging, a stabilized penalty schedule, and the Moreau envelope to handle non-smoothness. Experiments across multiple settings show that SPBM matches or outperforms existing constrained optimization baselines while incurring only linear runtime overhead compared to unconstrained Adam for up to 10,000 constraints.
2605.18618.paper_summary_zh: 受限機器學習使得公平意識的訓練、物理知識驅動的神經網絡，以及將符號領域知識整合到統計模型中成為可能。儘管其實際重要性不言而喻，但在深度學習中自然出現的非凸、非光滑、隨機設定下，尚不存在通用的方法。我們提出了隨機懲罰障礙法（SPBM），該方法通過指數對偶平均、穩定的懲罰計劃和Moreau包絡來擴展經典的懲罰和障礙方法，以處理非光滑性。多個設定下的實驗顯示，SPBM的表現與現有的受限優化基準相當或更優，且與無限制的Adam相比，僅增加了線性的運行時間開銷，支持多達10,000個約束條件。
2605.18618.author: Adam Bosák et.al.
2605.18618.authors: Adam Bosák, Andrii Kliachkin, Jana Lepšová, Gilles Bareilles, Jakub Mareček
